homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.description:

questions.description:

CAPTION
This energetic and aggressive punk rock track features a male vocalist singing in a high-pitch range while a guitar plays a fast, simple riff. The song maintains an upbeat tempo that makes it suitable for skate videos or a live concert setting with a mosh pit. Electric guitars and drums drive the heavy, sporty mood throughout the performance.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment is an instrumental Game Soundtrack featuring a strong emphasis on the violin within a slow, steady rhythm. The music creates a melancholic and pensive atmosphere that evokes nostalgia, making it well-suited for scenes like dungeon exploration or quiet character reflection. While archival data suggests baroque influences with a harpsichord, the overall texture remains a nuanced blend of classical elements designed to support narrative storytelling.

The music maintains a driving rhythm throughout, giving the piece a forward-moving feel typical of progressive rock styles.

A groovy bass line and steady drumming rhythm drive the piece, which is supported by warm keyboard or Rhodes piano accompaniment. The slow tempo and relaxing vibe make it an ideal choice for background music in calm settings like lounges or spas.
